block_02: Struggling to draw attention to your affiliate offers? To do this, you need to make sure that you approach people through the right traffic sources.
block_03: Today, we’ll explain what traffic sources webmasters 🔧 and media buyers 💰 can use to increase conversions.
block_05: If you have a budget to spend, opt for Google/Yahoo/Bing ads. Paid traffic is more predictable, speedy, and scalable.
block_06: Note that you can use search and display contextual advertising by promoting your own websites only. You can make your own, customized, useful page with broker reviews and comparison tables and promote it using paid advertising.
block_08: A website is a digital storefront for your affiliate links. It takes time to set up, but it pays off with beautiful organic traffic in case your website provides relevant content.
block_09: Important: copying and duplicating the IQ Option website and landing pages is forbidden.
block_11: For many people in the world, YouTube, Facebook, Telegram, TikTok, and other social media are the internet. Spread the word over the online media popular in your target geo.
block_12: Some countries give more credit to their local platforms: for example, Weibo in China, Line in Thailand, and Naver in South Korea. Transfer your affiliate effort to the local hangouts if they are big in your geo.
block_14: If you make search engines love you, you’re in a good place. You can develop your SEO network and auto-generate traffic for years to come without spending any more money on it.
block_16: Ad networks are intermediaries between advertisers and publishers. There are many out there, but we do not recommend any specific ones — each partner can have different results, even within the same network and with the same budget and targeting settings. Spy on the affiliate and advertisers’ forums to find hints for certain networks.
block_17: The secret of success is permanent experimenting. Test-drive different sources and diversify — that’s how you know your conversions will keep growing!
